hero_subtitle: SFTY structures IVMS101 data exchange and Travel Rule workflows into auditable cases that preserve message integrity, track exceptions, and support compliance review for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions

problem_title: Travel Rule data remains disconnected across providers
problem_description: Travel Rule message components and IVMS101 data often reside in separate systems without a unified view. This disconnect slows compliance reviews, weakens audit evidence, and complicates exception handling for exchange compliance teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates IVMS101 data, provider outputs, exception statuses and audit evidence into a unified workflow so exchange compliance teams can manage Travel Rule reviews and regulatory case reporting efficiently.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures Travel Rule message exceptions and routes them through case creation, review, decision logging and evidence preservation for audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, routing status, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one structured compliance workflow without replacing existing providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges managing Travel Rule data, preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling controlled deployment with bank due diligence and provider orchestration.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messaging, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions, cases and evidence into one compliance workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes incomplete or failed Travel Rule events into case workflows, enabling structured review and resolution while preserving audit evidence for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence related to Travel Rule messages, supporting audit-ready records for regulatory review and internal governance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports integration with multiple Travel Rule providers, aggregating their outputs into a connected operational layer without disrupting existing workflows or provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule messaging providers; it connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reporting for enhanced operational control.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule audit evidence with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects IVMS101 data, exceptions, routing and cases into controlled workflows and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
